column1: # TIA-102.BABA-A annex_h_interleave.csv — Bit Frame Format / Full-Rate Interleaving
# Extracted from pdftotext -layout output with verification: All 144 bit positions (c0..c7) covered exactly once; OCR fix applied at symbol 51 (c9(5) -> c0(5))
# Bit-index convention: indices are LSB-first within each codeword vector.
#   For c_0..c_3 (23-bit Golay) max index = 22; for c_4..c_6 (15-bit Hamming) max = 14; for c_7 (7-bit raw) max = 6.
# MSB-first implementations use: flat = offset[v] + (size[v] - 1 - bit_index).
